title: AIO - Diamond Detector
description: It detects if you are looking at a diamond ore block max. 10 blocks away. Even behind walls.
body:
***Diamond Detector***

Craft yourself a Diamond ore detector

![Crafting recipe for detector](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30d82ffc874d7da515e6cf1d32adde591f075d50.png)

The distance it can travel is 10 blocks away.

**Usage:**
- Hold the detector in your hand and hold right-click.
- Look slowly around you and hope for a sound.
